subject: [PATCH v4 5/5] mm: add tracepoints for zone lock

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch adds tracepoints to the Linux kernel's zone lock acquire and release operations, allowing for tracing of these events when CONFIG_TRACING is enabled. The implementation uses a lightweight inline helper to check if tracing is active, and calls an out-of-line helper when tracing is enabled. When tracing is disabled, the helpers compile to empty inline stubs, leaving the fast path unaffected.
